implementation: [Documentation]    Enter text into the Username field.
Input Text When Ready    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}    ${text}
[Documentation]    Enter password into the Password field.
Input Password When Ready    ${PASSWORD}    ${password}
[Documentation]    Click the Sign In button.
Click When Ready    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Verify the Username field, Password field, and Sign In button are visible and enabled on the Login page.
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${USER_NAME_TEXTBOX}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${PASSWORD}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${SIGN_IN_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Verify the Back button and Home button are visible and enabled on the Login page.
Wait For Element To Be Ready    id=auto_back_btn
Wait For Element To Be Ready    id=auto_home_btn
[Documentation]    Verify the Password field masks entered characters.
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${PASSWORD}
${password_type}=    Get Element Attribute    ${PASSWORD}    type
Should Be Equal    ${password_type}    password
[Documentation]    Verify the generic Failed authentication message is displayed.
Wait Until Element Is Visible    xpath=//*[contains(normalize-space(.),'Failed')]
[Documentation]    Enter provided credentials and submit login.
Enter User Name    ${username}
Enter Password    ${password}
Click Sign In Button
[Documentation]    Enter approved valid credentials and submit login.
Login With Credentials    ${VALID_USERNAME}    ${VALID_PASSWORD}
[Documentation]    Enter invalid credentials and submit login.
Login With Credentials    ${INVALID_USERNAME}    ${INVALID_PASSWORD}
